review_text: Amazing battery life! Lasts me through the entire workday without needing a charge.
Sound quality is excellent. Deep bass and clear treble. Worth every rupee.
Build quality feels premium. The earbuds fit perfectly and don't fall out during runs.
Delivered in 2 days! Very fast shipping and the product works great.
Price is very reasonable for the sound quality you get. Highly recommend.
Customer support helped me quickly when one earbud stopped working. Great service.
Battery drains too fast. Only lasts 3 hours on a full charge. Very disappointing.
Packaging was nice and unboxing experience felt premium.
Noise cancellation is average but price makes it acceptable.
Connectivity is rock solid. No drops even when phone is in another room.
Bass bahut achhi hai. Gym mein use karta hoon, bilkul perfect hai.
Bahut hi bekar product hai. Battery sirf 2 ghante chalti hai. Waste of money.
Idu thumba chennagide! Sound quality superb agi ide. Beleyu sari agi ide.
Paisa vasool product. Sound bahut badhiya hai aur battery bhi achhi hai.
Touch controls are very responsive. Easy to use even during workouts.
Mic quality is excellent for calls. People say my voice is very clear.
The charging case is sleek and pocket-friendly. Great design overall.
One earbud stopped working after 2 weeks. Support took 5 days to respond. Not good.
For the price, this is the best earbuds you can get in the market right now.
Delivery was delayed by 5 days with no updates. Product is good though.
Water resistance is great. Used in rain and gym without any issues.
Sound is too tinny for my liking. Expected better bass at this price.
Packaging was simple but product arrived safely. No complaints.
Battery life is absolutely phenomenal. 8 hours per charge is amazing!
Build feels a bit plasticky compared to competitors at similar price.
Support team is very helpful. Replaced my unit within a week. Happy!
Yes wow so amazing, only disconnects every 5 minutes. Totally usable. 10/10.
Oh sure the battery lasts forever... if you count 3 hours as forever. Great job.
Ear tips are comfortable and come in 3 sizes. Fits perfectly for long use.
Price has gone up recently. Still worth it but used to be a better deal.
Delivered faster than expected. Courier was very professional.
Sound stage is wide. Love listening to music and watching movies with these.
The earbuds feel sturdy and well-made. Dropped them multiple times, still working.
Charging takes forever. 2 hours to charge is too long compared to competitors.
Customer service is very poor. No response even after 3 emails.
Very nice product. My whole family loves it. Recommended to friends also.
App integration is smooth. Equalizer settings are easy to customize.
Sound quality deteriorated after 3 months. Seems like a build quality issue.
Packaging is eco-friendly which I appreciate. Product was well protected.
Great value for money. Competes with earbuds twice the price.
Battery life is consistent. Still gets 7.5 hours after 6 months of use.
Touch controls are sometimes too sensitive. Accidentally skip songs while adjusting.
Premium unboxing experience. Feels like a luxury product from outside.
Sound is amazing for this price range. Excellent clarity and detail.
Delivery packaging was secure. Product came in perfect condition.
Support team resolved my issue within 24 hours. Very professional.
Paani mein bhi kaam karta hai! Gym ke liye perfect earbuds hain.
Ivu tumba hodige bittare olleya sound baruttade. Ondhu vaara upayogisidde.
Earbuds fit my small ears perfectly. No pain even after 4 hours.
Price point is perfect. Not too cheap to feel suspicious, not too expensive.
Left earbud has lower volume than right. Seems like a defect from factory.
Delivery was on time but courier left package outside in rain. Product was fine.
These are the best earbuds I have owned. Clean sound, long battery, stylish.
Build quality could be better. The hinge on charging case feels weak.
Support response time improved a lot. Got a reply in 2 hours this time.
Wow, what incredible noise cancellation. Could still hear everything perfectly. Just brilliant.
Great earbuds! Using them for 4 months now, no issues whatsoever.
Battery percentage indicator in app is very useful. Nice feature.
Latency is very low. Great for watching videos and gaming.
Comfortable for long calls. Used 3 hours straight in meetings without discomfort.
Excellent product delivery and packaging. No damage at all during shipping.
Sound quality is good but nothing extraordinary. Expected a bit more.
Build is solid. Metal accents make it look premium and feel durable.
Battery life exceeds what is advertised. Getting 9 hours easily!
Price increased by 300 rupees recently. Still okay but hurts a little.
Arrived 1 day early. Excellent delivery service. Very happy.
Customer support is excellent. They even followed up after replacement.
Ek dum mast hai. Dost ne bhi order kar liya. Sab khush hain.
Sound is very crisp and clear. Good for both music and calls.
Packaging damage! The outer box was completely crushed when it arrived.
My package arrived with the box totally smashed. Inner product was okay but very shocked.
Box came completely flattened. Looks like someone sat on it. Not acceptable.
The packaging was crushed and torn. I was worried the earbuds were damaged.
Received a smashed box. The delivery partner must have thrown it. Terrible.
Outer packaging completely destroyed. Looked like it was run over. Unacceptable.
Why is the packaging so bad now? Earlier orders came perfectly. This one was crushed.
Product box arrived dented and broken open. Need better packaging protection.
Third time ordering this product and packaging has never been this bad. Crushed box.
Package looked like it was thrown from a truck. Box completely smashed. Very disappointed.
Delivery box was broken and open. Thankfully earbuds inside worked fine.
Box arrived completely damaged. Photos taken and raised complaint. No response yet.
Outer packaging was crushed and inner foam was damaged too. This needs fixing urgently.
I was gifting this to my friend and the box arrived in terrible condition. Very embarrassing.
Package completely smashed. Looks like it fell from height. Product earbuds were scratched.
Packing bahut kharab tha. Dabbe mein ghusa hua tha. Andar ka product theek tha.
Box was open and contents were loose when I received. Packaging totally failed.
Received a battered package. The wrapping was torn and the inner box had deep dents.
Packaging crushed from one side. Earbuds still work but I paid for a gift-ready product.
Something is very wrong with delivery packaging. Every order I see online has damaged box.
Good earbuds overall. Battery performance is solid even in cold weather.
Box was smashed on arrival. Very disappointed. Product itself seems fine but packaging terrible.
Earbuds sound quality is great. Packaging could definitely be improved.
Package arrived badly damaged and dented. Courier service needs serious improvement.
The box was completely crushed. I actually thought the earbuds inside were broken.
Support was helpful and offered replacement when I showed them photo of smashed packaging.
Packaging damaged again! This is the second order in a row with a crushed box.
Box arrived looking like trash. Multiple tears and dents. Raised return request.
Delivery box was bent from corner but product was safe. Still, packaging needs work.
Sound quality is top notch. No packaging complaints from my order, came safely.
My entire package was open and resealed with tape. Clearly handled badly.
Battery and sound both excellent. Packaging on my order was fine.
Received crushed packaging again. This is clearly a systemic problem not isolated.
Ordered as birthday gift. Box arrived smashed. Completely ruined the presentation.
Box arrived completely smashed on one side. The earbuds inside were fortunately working.
NovaBuds sound quality is best in class under 2000 rupees range.
My box was crushed and dirty. Please improve packaging. Product quality is good.
Packaging damaged on delivery. This is the third complaint I've seen this week about same issue.
Best earbuds ever! Amazing product! Excellent quality! Must buy!

Earbuds are great but very concerned about the damaged box I received.
Battery performance is still top tier. Using for 8 months now.
Packaging was dented and one corner fully collapsed. Very bad first impression.
Support responded quickly when I reported damaged packaging. Appreciated!
Ordered for mom's birthday. Box came smashed. Had to rewrap completely before giving.
Crispy sound quality. No issues with my packaging, arrived clean and safe.
Overall good product but packaging team needs to do better.
Seriously the worst packaging I have received in years. Absolutely destroyed box.
Battery lasts all day. Perfect for office use. Sound is also clear for calls.
Price is justified. Good build, good sound, reliable battery.
Packaging completely smashed again. This is not a one-off, this is a serious problem.
Box was completely destroyed. I shared a photo on social media. Very unhappy.
Delivery was 3 days late and box was damaged. Double disappointment.
Build quality is excellent. Dropped in water and it survived. Impressive.
My box arrived crushed from all sides. Looked like it was in a war. Unacceptable.
Sound quality outstanding. I don't care about the box as long as product works.
Support didn't help when I reported the damaged delivery. Waiting for a week now.
Packaging crushed on delivery. This seems to be a widespread issue right now.
Bluetooth range is excellent. Works perfectly from 10 meters away.
Very good earbuds for the price. No complaints about battery or sound.
Package came smashed. Box was completely bent and the tape was already open.
Solid earbuds. Build quality reminds me of more expensive brands.
Got my order today. Box was torn and dented. Please fix your packaging process.
Five stars for sound, one star for packaging. Arrived like garbage.
Excellent value for money. Using daily for gym and office. No issues.
Package was badly damaged on arrival. Product was okay but the box was destroyed.
Battery life is great. Easily lasts 2 days for my moderate usage.
Touch control sensitivity is perfect. Just the right level of response.
Totally crushed box received. Packaging has gone from great to terrible in 3 months.
Packaging damaged badly. I'm leaving a 1 star review specifically for this issue.
Build quality is superb. Earbuds feel like they will last years.
Earbuds are good but the courier handling is appalling. Box was destroyed.
Battery performance consistent over time. No degradation after 7 months.
Received completely smashed package. Filing complaint with Flipkart as well.
Price is fair and competitive. Customer support was kind and quick.
Excellent earbuds. Best purchase of the year for me personally.
Received damaged packaging once again. Very frustrated with delivery quality.
Sound is clear but slightly lacking in mids. Still good overall.
Box arrived in terrible condition. Completely flattened. Took video for proof.
Delivery was on time and packaging was perfect on my order. Happy!
Great earbuds. Battery still lasts full day even after 6 months daily use.
Ordered for my brother. Box was smashed on one entire side. Very ugly.
This is a 5-star product being brought down by poor packaging and delivery.
Packaging has been a consistent problem in recent orders based on my friends' reports too.
Premium sound at a budget price. Nothing more to say. Excellent product.
Good product overall. Unfortunately my box came with a massive dent on top.
Build is robust and earbuds are comfortable. Packaging was okay on my delivery.
My cousin ordered this same week and both of us got damaged boxes. What's happening?
Returning this order. Box was destroyed and I don't want to take risk with earbuds.
Earbuds are top class. Zero issues over 8 months of heavy use.
Price is absolutely worth it. Sound quality beats earbuds costing twice as much.
Delivery package was completely destroyed when it reached me. Filed complaint.
Packaging issue becoming viral online. Several complaints on Twitter about smashed boxes.
NovaBuds X1 is my favorite product this year despite the packaging problems.
Battery is great, sound is great, build is great. Please only fix the packaging issue.
My entire outer packaging was torn open. This is clearly a courier partner problem.
Super impressed with battery life. Got 9.5 hours on volume 60 percent.
The build quality is exceptional. Solid hinges, no wobble, feels expensive.
Box came smashed and product was scratched. This is unacceptable for a sealed product.
Delivery was fast. No packaging issues on my order. Very happy!
Customer support gave me a 10 percent discount for the packaging damage I reported.
Earbuds are worth it. Just make sure you complain if box is damaged when received.
Package completely destroyed. Earbuds had a scratch. Returning it. Very unhappy.
Sound quality is pure perfection at this price point. Highly recommend.
Box arrived smashed and inner foam was displaced. Earbuds still worked though.
Build quality feel has improved from the previous version. Great update.
Price is the best in segment. Nobody else offers this sound for this cost.
My package was crushed and dirty. Clearly thrown around by courier. Very bad experience.
Support team was empathetic about packaging damage. Offered replacement quickly.
Battery charges fast with the included cable. Full charge in under 90 minutes.
Earbuds are excellent but packaging is destroying customer trust. Needs urgent fix.
Got damaged packaging but product inside was completely fine. Lucky.
Five stars. Best earbuds I have ever bought. Sound, battery, build — all perfect.
Received a box that was completely caved in. The earbuds had a deep scratch on the case.
Packaging has become a real problem. I see new complaints daily on the product page.
Delivery was express and packaging was intact. Great experience overall.
Overall happy with the earbuds. Just wish the packaging problem was fixed.
Earbuds are honestly the best in this range. Zero regrets despite packaging issue.
Box came completely destroyed. Packaging quality is a serious crisis right now.
I love these earbuds. Using every day. Sound, battery, build — all top quality.
Packaging was crushed and earbuds case had a crack. Raised return request.
Earbuds fit comfortably and stay in ear during sports. Very reliable.
My cousin and I both ordered the same week. Both received smashed boxes. Very bad.
Sound quality is exceptional. Mic pickup during calls is also very accurate.
Packaging still being crushed. I see reviews from today also complaining. Not fixed yet.
This product is amazing. Battery life and audio quality are both market-leading.
Third consecutive order with damaged packaging. This brand has a serious problem.
Great earbuds. Delivered on time and packaging was undamaged for my order.
Box was smashed beyond recognition. I am very disappointed with the overall experience.
Build quality is excellent. Using outdoors daily with no issues.
Battery backup is excellent. Exactly as advertised, if not better.
Packaging came crushed. Inner earbuds case was cracked. Filed a complaint immediately.
Price hike of 200 rupees noticed this month. Still good value though.
Earbuds are fantastic. But please sort out the packaging issue. Its going viral.
Sound is just incredible. Nothing else at this price point comes close.
Received crushed package. I recorded unboxing on video. Sending to support.
Build quality and battery life are genuinely impressive. Long lasting product.
Package completely smashed. Earbuds still functional but gifting was ruined.
Earbuds are durable. Fell in water during monsoon and still working perfectly.
Packaging damage has gotten worse this month. Daily complaints visible on listing page.
Happy customer. Product delivered safely. No issues at all with my order.
Package arrived looking like garbage bag. Earbuds had scratches all over.

Outer and inner packaging both destroyed. Earbuds appeared to have been dropped.
Great earbuds. Long battery life. Good build quality. Reasonable price.
Package was crushed and open when delivered. Clearly mishandled. Very angry.

Delivery super fast. Arrived next day! Packaging was perfect too.

Build quality rivals products costing 3 times more. Very impressed.
Packaging crisis is getting worse every week. Need urgent action from brand.
